meta.title: Isla Café — Your island corner in Miami
meta.description: Specialty coffee, Caribbean brunch, and neighborhood warmth in Cutler Bay, Miami.

hero.subtitle: Specialty coffee, Caribbean brunch, and neighborhood warmth — made fresh every morning.

historia.label: Our story
historia.body: It all started with four friends, a shared dream, and the courage to take a chance.

pillars.title: Heritage & specialty
pillars.body: Classic Cuban flavors alongside handcrafted specialty drinks — familiar recipes rediscovered with a fresh perspective.

pillars.title: A leap of faith
pillars.body: We traded comfort for uncertainty because we believed the community deserved a café that celebrates where we come from.

pillars.title: Friendship & culture
pillars.body: More than a coffee shop — a place built by friendship, fueled by passion, and rooted in Cuban culture.

visitanos.mapTitle: Map of Isla Café — 18901 SW 106th Ave, Cutler Bay

items.question: What are your hours?
items.answer: We're open Monday to Friday 7:00 AM–6:00 PM, Saturday 8:00 AM–6:00 PM, and Sunday 9:00 AM–3:00 PM. Holiday hours may vary — check our Instagram to confirm.

items.question: Do you have vegan and gluten-free options?
items.answer: Yes — oat and coconut milk at no extra charge, gluten-free toast, and several plant-based brunch options. Ask the team about today's special.

items.question: Do you sell whole bean coffee?
items.answer: We roast weekly and sell 340g bags at the bar and online. Ask about the monthly subscription — freshly roasted, delivered to your door.

items.question: Is there wifi and outlets for working?
items.answer: Fast free wifi and outlets at most tables. We only ask that you free up the large tables during peak brunch hours (Sat–Sun 10 AM–1 PM).

footer.tagline: Your island corner in Cutler Bay. Coffee roasted in-house, Caribbean brunch, and plenty of calm.
